greeting: Hi there! Welcome to Betty's Dog Wash & Grooming. I'm the virtual receptionist. How can we help your pup today?

faq.a: Yes! Please call us at (480) 893-9180 or book online through our scheduling system.

faq.q: How long does a full groom take?
faq.a: Usually 1-2 hours depending on breed, size, and coat condition.
